title: Mftrace.exe
html:
Mftrace.exe

Trace log generation tool for Media Foundation Tools.

Execute

Local execution of cmd.exe as a subprocess of Mftrace.exe.

Mftrace.exe {PATH:.exe}

Launch specified executable as a subprocess of Mftrace.exe. — MITRE: T1127 — Privileges: User
